has_known_bounces.description: Whether email sent to this address is known to have bounced previously.

has_valid_syntax.description: Whether this email address is valid.

is_suspected_role_address.description: Whether the local part of the email appears to be a role or group, rather than an individual end user.

normalized_email.description: The normalized email address after removing '.' characters and any characters after a '+'.

tumbling_character_count.description: The number of '.' and '+' characters in the email address. A higher tumbling count indicates a higher potential for fraud.
